jQuery('.switcher-mobile .selected').click(function() {if(!(jQuery('.switcher-mobile .option').is(':visible'))) {jQuery('.switcher-mobile .option').stop(true,true).delay(100).slideDown(500);jQuery('.switcher-mobile .selected a').toggleClass('open')}}); jQuery('.switcher-mobile .option').bind('mousewheel', function(e) {var options = jQuery('.switcher-mobile .option');if(options.is(':visible'))options.scrollTop(options.scrollTop() - e.originalEvent.wheelDelta);return false;}); jQuery('body').not('.switcher-mobile').mousedown(function(e) {if(jQuery('.switcher-mobile .option').is(':visible') && e.target != jQuery('.switcher-mobile .option').get(0)) {jQuery('.switcher-mobile .option').stop(true,true).delay(100).slideUp(500);jQuery('.switcher-mobile .selected a').toggleClass('open')}});

Thayer Public Library
Your browser has javascript disabled. Without javascript some functions will not work.
Book your Institution & Museum passes here.
Boston by Foot Community Passes are valid for all public walking tours. They are not valid for booking on the private tour calendar, water-based tours, or our two annual celebration tours (Beacon Hill with a BOO! & Footloose on the Freedom Trail). Use the code on your confirmation email to redeem your Community Pass ticket(s) from www.bostonbyfoot.org as admission.
Boston Children’s Museum Admits up to four (adults or children) at half price per person. After receiving a library discount pass, you must reserve a visit online with Boston Children’s Museum. You confirmation from the library will have instructions. You will need to show the Museum both the Library Reservation and the tickets they send you. Two annual memberships of $700.00 each are provided by the Friends...
Boston Harbor Islands Ferry Boston Harbor Islands National and State Park is for everyone! The Boston Harbor Islands Partnership is committed to providing free and reduced-fare opportunities for groups and individuals. Library pass provides 50% off all Boston Harbor Islands Ferry tickets from Long Wharf. Based on availability; reservations are recommended. Use the promo code from your confirmation email on the Boston...
Children's Museum Easton Pass admits up to two people for 50% off admission price. Best for children ages one through seven. Annual membership of $300 provided by the Friends of Thayer Public Library.
Harvard Museums of Science and Culture Each pass admits up to four people at 50% off regular admission rates. Redeem the pass at the Harvard Museum of Natural History or the Peabody Museum of Archeology and Ethnology Admission Desk. Includes access to all four HMSC museums: Harvard Museum of Natural History, 26 Oxford St. Cambridge, MA 02138 Peabody Museum of Archeology and Ethnology, 11 Divinity Ave. Cambridge, MA...
Heritage Museums & Gardens E-ticket. Pass admits up to six (6) people, adults or youth (children 2 and under are free) for 50% off entry admissions. Once you make your library reservation your will receive a discount code. You will then need to purchase your tickets through the Heritage website and use the code for your discount. Closed November, December, January, February and March. Annual membership of...
Institute of Contemporary Art E-ticket. Each pass admits two people with a $10 per person charge at the Museum. Children 17 and under are free. Two passes may be reserved for each visit. Admission is free for all on Thursdays from 5 to 9 and for families (up to 2 adults accompanied by children under 12) on the last Saturday of the month. The ICA is no longer requiring timed entry for admission to the museum, however advance...
Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum E-ticket. Pass admits up to four people with a $5.00 per person charge. Free to those under 18. Reserve and receive digital passes and purchase Museum admission timed-entry tickets in advance using the unique promo code given with each pass. Annual membership of $195.00 provided by the Friends of Thayer Public Library.
Massachusetts ParksPass Various locations throughout Massachusetts: Locations | Mass.gov Each pass admits allows free parking for one vehicle at over 50 day-use facilities in the state parks system that charge a parking fee. This pass must be returned to the Reference Desk by 10:00 am on the day after use. If the Library is closed on the day after use, it is due the next day the Library is open. Annual membership...
Museum of Fine Arts Each pass is good for up to two adult tickets ($15 each) and four youth tickets ($10 each). After making your reservation you will receive a confirmation email containing a Promo Code which is redeemable online, over the phone, or at any MFA ticket desk. Passes are not applicable toward discounts on shopping, parking, dining, films, concerts, lectures, courses, or any other public programs. All...
Museum of Science E-ticket. Pass admits up to four people for half off the regular admission charge. Your Library pass can only be used on the date you reserved. Click on Pass Info on your confirmation email from the library for the discount code. You must also call the museum to reserve a timed ticket. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free but must have a timed...
New England Aquarium E-voucher. This coupon allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium for adult and child admission. You may find current rates by viewing https://www.neaq.org/visit/tickets/. This is not a ticket. Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to four individuals. Children under 3 receive free admission. The Aquarium pass p...
Plimoth Patuxet Museums The e-ticket must be presented to Plimoth Patuxet Museums guest services staff upon arrival at the Museum for Thayer Public Library patrons to purchase a Heritage Pass, Combination Pass, or Plimoth Patuxet Only pass for up to six individuals at the reduced rate of $18 per adult; $12 per child ages 5-17. Includes admission to three sites — Plimouth Plantation (the 1627 English Village,...
Zoo New England Admits six (6) people at $9.00 per adult and $6.00 per child (2-12). Annual membership of $650.00 provided by the Friends of Thayer Public Library.
